'''Bottle bug''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of insect native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. They were the favored prey of [[snapfish]].<ref name="Shatter" />

==Appearances==
*[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
